appraisal_events.evidence: « Non, c'est une petite Mme de Cambremer... je n'ai aucune espèce de notion de qui c'est... Ça doit être des “gens de la campagne” ! ... ces “invités de chez Belloir” »
appraisal_events.explanation: The worldly voice that responds demeans Mme de Cambremer by treating her as a provincial unknown and even as a 'hired' extra, which discredits her socially. The bewilderingly chatty formulation is presented in an ironized manner.

appraisal_events.evidence: « Ah ! Mais Cambremer, c'est un nom authentique et ancien »
appraisal_events.explanation: The general counters the depreciation by recalling the prestige of the name, reassociating Mme de Cambremer with a recognized lineage.

status_effects.explanation: The reminder of the genuine antiquity of the name Cambremer gives her social credit contrary to the previous snobbery.
